'''"Rachet" Gramzee''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] who lived during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. "Rachet" might have been his nickname. The [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head for stealing a chemical process used in the production of [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]]. The bounty was claimed by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], who caught him. It's possible that he was an accomplice to [[Lokk Gimble]], who was wanted for the same crime.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
